Package io.micronaut.mcp.jsonrpc

Record Class ErrorResponse<I,T>

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.micronaut.mcp.jsonrpc.ErrorResponse<I,T>
Type Parameters:
I - The type of the id field (String, Number, or null).
T - The type of additional error information
Record Components:
jsonrpc - Version of the JSON-RPC protocol.
error - Error representation
id - This member is REQUIRED. It MUST be the same as the value of the id member in the Request Object. If there was an error in detecting the id in the Request object, it MUST be Null.
public record ErrorResponse<I,T>(@NonNull String jsonrpc, @NonNull Error<T> error, I id) extends Record
JSON-RPC Successful Response.
See Also:

      public ErrorResponse(@NonNull @NonNull String jsonrpc, @NonNull @NonNull Error<T> error, @Nullable I id)
      Creates an instance of a ErrorResponse record class.
      Parameters:
      jsonrpc - the value for the jsonrpc record component
      error - the value for the error record component
      id - the value for the id record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      Returns the value of the error record component.

      @Nullable public I id()
      Returns the value of the id record component.
